response.justification: Strong senior generalist with notable geospatial domain experience (GISCollective, Green Map) and proven low-latency systems work at Sociomantic, but the resume shows no modern C++ or Rust experience. The only C++ exposure was a brief stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015), and the primary stacks are TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. Given the role explicitly requires modern C++ or equivalent Rust as a primary language, the technical fit is weak despite the relevant domain knowledge.
strengths: Direct geospatial/navigation domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map work
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/sec)
Senior engineer with strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: No modern C++ experience; last C/C++ role ended in 2015
No Rust experience listed anywhere in the resume
Primary expertise (TS/Node/DLang) does not match the required C++/Rust pipeline stack
